claim_text: Deepfakes are a powerful and dangerous tool in the arsenal of those that want to wage disinformation campaigns.
Widespread access to generative AI is making disinformation damage so much more sophisticated and easier to disseminate.
Deepfakes have the potential to wreak havoc on our democracy by attributing speech and conduct to a person that is false or that never happened.
The use of a minor's personal data in AI presents an especially urgent set of risks.
The promises and perils of AI are becoming increasingly clear.
Children's highly sensitive information is used in AI development.
AI has immense potential to enhance healthcare delivery. (This reiterates a broad, positive potential for AI in healthcare).
AI has the potential to improve access to care and save insurers money. (This claims a potential benefit and efficiency gain from AI in healthcare administration).
AI algorithms can lead to erroneous or biased decisions on medical treatment. (This claims a significant flaw or risk associated with AI in medical decision-making).

Generative AI content (images, audio, video) has potential for misuse, including spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes. (This claims specific, harmful applications made possible by generative AI capabilities).
AI-detection tools exist for users to query content origin. (This claims the availability and function of AI detection technologies).
AI has become an integral part of daily life, influencing products. (This claims the widespread adoption and impact of AI).
Research has shown a correlation between the consumption of CSAM and an increased risk of individuals engaging in hands-on sexual offenses against minors.
Viewing and possessing such material can contribute to desensitization and may escalate criminal behavior.
Online child exploitation is exacerbated by the rise of AI.
Police use of face surveillance violates privacy.
Face surveillance could be used as a means of retaliation and suppression against Black Lives Matter activists.
The use of facial recognition technology by police departments increases racial disparities in Black and white arrest rates.
AI-generated pictures and videos of children being sexually abused are disturbing, harmful, and virtually indistinguishable from actual children.
AI-driven child sexual exploitation poses a new frontier of threats.
AI-generated content can be virtually indistinguishable from actual children.
All students need to understand basic AI principles and applications, and have the skills to recognize when AI is employed.

AI literacy is defined as the knowledge, skills, and attitudes associated with how artificial intelligence works, including its principles, concepts, applications, limitations, implications, and ethical considerations.
Students need to be aware of AI's implications, limitations, and ethical considerations.
Consultation with experts in the tech industry who are sounding the alarm about advanced AI technology is needed.
The future of humanity and how we live, work, and play, depends on thoughtful planning and management of the most advanced artificial intelligence systems.
Recent advances in AI present "profound risks to society and humanity".
